children.value: 次の 1、2 の等式が成り立つように a, b, c の値を求めよ。

\left(\begin{array}{ll}
a^2+b^2 & a b+b c \\
a b+b c & b^2+c^2
\end{array}\right)=\left(\begin{array}{ll}
1 & 0 \\
0 & 4
\end{array}\right)

children.html: a2+b2=1ab+bc=0b2+c2=4a^2 + b^2 = 1\\ ab + bc = 0\\ b^2 + c^2 = 4a2+b2=1ab+bc=0b2+c2=4
ab+bc=0→b(a+c)=0ab + bc = 0 \to b(a+c)=0ab+bc=0→b(a+c)=0
b=0b = 0b=0
a+c=0a + c = 0a+c=0
ab=−bcab = - bcab=−bc
a+c=0a+c=0a+c=0

(a2+b2)−(b2+c2)=1−4→a2−c2=−3→a2−c2=−3→a−c=−3→a=−3+c→a+c=−3+2c≠0(a^2 + b^2) - (b^2 + c^2) = 1 - 4\\ \to a^2 - c^2 = -3\\ \to \sqrt{ a^2 - c^2 } = \sqrt{ -3 }\\ \to a - c = \sqrt{ -3 }\\ \to a = \sqrt{ -3 } + c\\ \to a + c = \sqrt{ -3 } + 2c \neq 0\\(a2+b2)−(b2+c2)=1−4→a2−c2=−3→a2−c2​=−3​→a−c=−3​→a=−3​+c→a+c=−3​+2c=0
b=0b = 0b=0

children.value: の可能性のみになるので、

children.html: a2+b2=a2=1→a=±1b2+c2=c2=4→c=±2a^2 + b^2 = a^2 = 1 \to a = \pm 1\\ b^2 + c^2 = c^2 = 4 \to c = \pm 2\\a2+b2=a2=1→a=±1b2+c2=c2=4→c=±2

children.value:
\left(\begin{array}{ccc}
a^2+b^2 & 1 & 2 a c \\
1 & 1 & 1 \\
2 c a & 1 & b^2+c^2
\end{array}\right)=\left(\begin{array}{ccc}
1 & 2 b c & 1 \\
2 b c & c^2+a^2 & 2 a b \\
1 & 2 a c & 1
\end{array}\right)
children.html: (a2+b212ac1112ca1b2+c2)=(12bc12bcc2+a22ab12ac1)\left(\begin{array}{ccc} a^2+b^2 & 1 & 2 a c \\ 1 & 1 & 1 \\ 2 c a & 1 & b^2+c^2 \end{array}\right)=\left(\begin{array}{ccc} 1 & 2 b c & 1 \\ 2 b c & c^2+a^2 & 2 a b \\ 1 & 2 a c & 1 \end{array}\right)⎝⎛​a2+b212ca​111​2ac1b2+c2​⎠⎞​=⎝⎛​12bc1​2bcc2+a22ac​12ab1​⎠⎞​

{a2+b2=1b2+c2=1c2+a2=12ab=12ac=12bc=1\begin{cases} \begin{align} a^2 + b^2 &= 1\\ b^2 + c^2 &= 1\\ c^2 + a^2 &= 1\\ 2ab &= 1\\ 2ac &= 1\\ 2bc &= 1\\ \end{align} \end{cases}⎩⎨⎧​a2+b2b2+c2c2+a22ab2ac2bc​=1=1=1=1=1=1​​​

children.value: という連立方程式とする

children.html: (a2+b2)−(b2+c2)=1−1→a2−c2=0→a2=c2(a2+b2)−(a2+c2)=1−1→b2−c2=0→b2=c2∴a2=b2=c2\begin{align} (a^2 + b^2) - (b^2 + c^2) &= 1 - 1\\ \to a^2 - c^2 &= 0 \\ \to a^2 = c^2 \\ (a^2 + b^2) - (a^2 + c^2) &= 1 - 1\\ \to b^2 - c^2 &= 0 \\ \to b^2 = c^2 \\ \therefore a^2 = b^2 = c^2 \end{align}(a2+b2)−(b2+c2)→a2−c2→a2=c2(a2+b2)−(a2+c2)→b2−c2→b2=c2∴a2=b2=c2​=1−1=0=1−1=0​​
a2+b2=1→2a2=1→a2=12a^2 + b^2 = 1\\ \to 2 a^2 = 1\\ \to a^2 = \frac{1}{2}\\a2+b2=1→2a2=1→a2=21​

∣a∣=12×22=22|a| = \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}} \times \frac{ \sqrt{2} }{ \sqrt{2} } = \frac{ \sqrt{2} }{2}∣a∣=2​1​×2​2​​=22​​
a=±22a = \pm \frac{ \sqrt{2} }{2}a=±22​​
a2=b2=c2=12a=b=c=±22a^2 = b^2 = c^2 = \frac{1}{2}\\ a = b = c = \pm \frac{\sqrt{2} }{2}\\a2=b2=c2=21​a=b=c=±22​​

children.value: 次の（ア）、（イ）の行列が対象行列となるように a の値を求めよ。

a^2 & a^3
\end{array}\right) \quad \text { (イ) }\left(\begin{array}{ccc}
1 & a & a^2 \\
a^3 & a^4 & a^5 \\
a^6 & a^7 & a^8
\end{array}\right)
